hops.context: Of the 10 patients that were enrolled
9 of them had a volume response of at least 50% shrinkage
they were classified as responders according to World Health Organization (WHO) metrics

question: According to the World Health Organization metrics, what is the minimum volume response observed in the majority of patients from the preclinical trial?

options.A: At least 25% shrinkage in tumor volume was observed in 9 out of 10 patients
options.B: At least 10% shrinkage in tumor volume was observed in 9 out of 10 patients
options.C: At least 75% shrinkage in tumor volume was observed in 9 out of 10 patients
options.D: At least 50% shrinkage in tumor volume was observed in 9 out of 10 patients

explanation: The correct answer is derived from the understanding that 9 of the 10 patients enrolled in the preclinical trial were classified as responders, having achieved at least 50% shrinkage in tumor volume, as measured by WHO metrics.
context: Of the 10 patients that were enrolled | 9 of them had a volume response of at least 50% shrinkage | they were classified as responders according to World Health Organization (WHO) metrics
